entries.title: Helmut Schmidt (SPD)
entries.description: Led West Germany through the oil crises and the 'German Autumn' of Red Army Faction terrorism.

entries.title: Helmut Kohl (CDU)
entries.description: Oversaw German reunification in 1990, becoming the first chancellor of a reunified Germany.

entries.title: Gerhard Schröder (SPD)
entries.description: Pushed through the Agenda 2010 labor market reforms and opposed the Iraq War.

entries.title: Angela Merkel (CDU)
entries.description: Germany's first female chancellor, serving 16 years through the Eurozone crisis, the 2015 refugee crisis, and COVID-19.

entries.title: Olaf Scholz (SPD)
entries.description: Led a three-party coalition through the energy crisis triggered by Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

entries.title: Friedrich Merz (CDU)
entries.description: Elected chancellor after a snap election, on a second ballot after failing to secure a majority on the first.
